infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take photos of inventory items and scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to log where items are checked out.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Inventory Tracker to access your camera for photos and QR scanning.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Inventory Tracker to access your location for checkout logging.
